category.name: Land and property (within or outside the UK)

fields.name: StartDate
fields.description: Date on which the land or property was acquired, or achieved registrable value

fields.name: EndDate
fields.description: Date on which interest in the property ended

fields.name: IsSoleOwner
fields.description: Whether the Member is the sole owner of the property

fields.name: Location
fields.description: Location of the land or property

fields.name: PropertyDescription
fields.description: A description of the property

fields.name: PropertyOwnerDetails
fields.description: Details about the ownership arrangements

fields.name: RegistrableRentalIncome
fields.description: Property has a rental income exceeding registrable threshold

fields.name: RentalIncomeDetails
fields.description: Details of any other recipients of rental income

fields.name: RentalIncomeStartDate
fields.description: Date on which the property began generating rental income

fields.name: RentalIncomeEndDate
fields.description: Date the rental income ended

fields.name: NumberOfProperties
fields.description: The number of properties this interest relates to

fields.name: IsLand
fields.description: Whether the interest relates to land or property

fields.name: IsAnyRentalIncomePaidToAnotherPerson
fields.description: Whether any rental income is paid to another person or organisation

fields.name: Country
fields.description: Country in which the land or property is located

fields.name: LandUse
fields.description: Use of the land

fields.name: PropertyType
fields.description: The type of property
